description: You are an industrial engineer tasked with creating a current-state Value Stream Map (VSM) for the Toyota Steering Bracket manufacturing case. Using the production metrics in ~/Desktop/production_metrics.csv and the mapping requirements in ~/Desktop/vsm_guide.txt, create a complete current-state VSM in draw.io. The VSM must include: a Supplier icon (Michigan Steel Coils Inc.) with EDI delivery info; a Customer icon (Toyota Motor Corp and Saturn Corp) with total daily demand of 920 brackets; all 5 process boxes in sequence (PC Press, Spot Weld I, Spot Weld II, Assembly I, Assembly II) showing C/T, C/O, Uptime%, Shifts, and Operators from the CSV; inventory triangles between every adjacent step showing WIP quantities (4600, 4700, 1100, 1600, 1200 units); push arrows; electronic and manual information flows from Production Control; a timeline bar at the bottom with alternating value-added and wait segments showing total lead time and total value-added time; and kaizen burst annotations on the 3 highest-waste steps. Save the diagram to ~/Diagrams/current_state_vsm.drawio and export it as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/current_state_vsm.pdf. Login: username ga, password password123.

metadata.data_source: Rother & Shook (1998) Learning to See, Lean Enterprise Institute
